creator: baroncorrz@gmail.com
text:
Given below are the reasons that can cause Epson window service disabled error:
•	The most common reason that causes this problem in Epson printers is Outdated or corrupted printer drivers.
•	Another common reason behind it is that your system is infected with a virus or malware attack.
•	You might also get this error if there's a problem with the scanner machine.
•	You haven't installed your printer properly or there's an issue with the setup.
•	The drivers for your printer are not installed completely which can happen if the download or installation was interrupted.
•	An issue with the scanning driver.
If you are also facing any such error with your printer then you should check the above-mentioned causes and work on them.
https://www.epsonprintersupportpro.us/blog/know-the-absolute-cause-of-epson-windows-service-disabled-error/
